title: PCR Preparation and Pooling with 384 Plates - Stage 1
author: Opentrons

steps.instruction: This protocol is Stage 1 of a 3 part PCR Prep protocol. Parts 2 and 3 can be found below. For detailed protocol details, please reference the "Protocol Steps" section. This protocol pools 4 plates one at a time into a fresh 384 well plate with water. Each PCR plate is pooled in order A1, A2, B1, B2 to A1 pool, then A3, A4, B3, B4 to A3 pool, etc. The next plate will pool all of the same source wells, but the destination wells of the pool will start at B1, skipping every other well. PCR plate 3 will start pooling at B1, and PCR plate wills start pooling at B2. [Stage 2 Protocol](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/08fd01-pt2) [Stage 3 Protocol](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/08fd01-pt3) ---
12ul of water is added to all wells in pool plate (same tip).
3ul of sample is pooled onto pool plate one plate at a time beginning in slot 1 (fresh tip).
